category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Mozambique market (INNOQ conformity, NM/IEC standards, energy labelling, INCM radio approval, Portuguese-language documentation).

title.en: China-to-Mozambique LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入莫桑比克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入莫三比克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Mozambique market-access expectations: INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade) conformity and NM standards that adopt IEC 60598 / 60598-1 / 62560 / 62471, electrical safety, EMC, energy labelling, INCM radio type-approval for wireless luminaires, and Portuguese-language documentation versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Mozambique generally adopts IEC-based standards and does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / chemical regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与莫桑比克市场准入要求对照：INNOQ（国家标准与质量研究所）合规及采纳 IEC 60598 / 60598-1 / 62560 / 62471 的 NM 标准、电气安全、电磁兼容、能效标签、智能灯具的 INCM 无线电型号核准，以及葡萄牙语文件，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。莫桑比克通常采纳基于 IEC 的标准，且不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS / 化学品管制制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與莫三比克市場准入要求對照：INNOQ（國家標準與質量研究所）合規及採納 IEC 60598 / 60598-1 / 62560 / 62471 的 NM 標準、電氣安全、電磁兼容、能效標籤、智能燈具的 INCM 無線電型號核准，以及葡萄牙語文件，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。莫三比克通常採納基於 IEC 的標準，且不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS / 化學品管制制度。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Mozambique law, INNOQ conformity requirements, adopted NM/IEC standards, energy-labelling rules, INCM radio approval obligations, and Portuguese-language documentation requirements with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行莫桑比克法律、INNOQ 合规要求、采纳的 NM/IEC 标准、能效标签规则、INCM 无线电核准义务及葡萄牙语文件要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行莫三比克法律、INNOQ 合規要求、採納的 NM/IEC 標準、能效標籤規則、INCM 無線電核准義務及葡萄牙語文件要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Mozambique should expect: INNOQ-administered conformity for regulated electrical products, built on NM (Norma Mocambicana) standards that adopt IEC 60598-1 / 60598-series for luminaire safety, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 61347-2-13 for LED control gear, CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 for EMC, and IEC 62471 for photobiological safety; a 220 V / 50 Hz supply (the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but Chinese three-phase 380 V product must be checked against the 220 V single-phase nominal); an energy-efficiency / labelling expectation for lighting products; INCM (Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique) type-approval for any luminaire with wireless functionality; Portuguese-language documentation, instructions, and markings; and an in-country importer for customs clearance through Maputo, Beira, or Nacala. Mozambique does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / restricted-substances or REACH-style chemical-notification regime, so there is no direct counterpart to the EU 'ecodesign' efficacy regulation (energy labelling is the nearest lever) and no horizontal RoHS to satisfy — but the importer should confirm current INNOQ regulated-product lists and any sector energy programme. Chinese CCC certification and GB test reports are not automatically recognised; IEC-based (IECEE CB) test reports are the practical bridge.
answer_first.zh: 向莫桑比克出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期：由 INNOQ 管理的受管制电气产品合规，建立在采纳 IEC 60598-1 / 60598 系列（灯具安全）、IEC 62560（自镇流灯）、IEC 61347-2-13（LED 控制装置）、CISPR 15 / IEC 61547（电磁兼容）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）的 NM（莫桑比克标准）之上；220 V / 50 Hz 供电（50 Hz 频率与中国一致，但中国三相 380 V 产品须对照 220 V 单相额定值核查）；照明产品的能效 / 标签预期；任何具备无线功能的灯具须取得 INCM（莫桑比克国家通信研究所）型号核准；葡萄牙语文件、说明书及标识；以及通过马普托、贝拉或纳卡拉口岸清关的在地进口商。莫桑比克不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS / 限用物质或 REACH 式化学品通报制度，因此无与欧盟生态设计能效法规直接对应的制度（能效标签为最接近的抓手），亦无须满足的横向 RoHS——但进口商应核实现行 INNOQ 受管制产品清单及任何行业能效计划。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 检测报告不自动获认可；基于 IEC 的（IECEE CB）检测报告是实际的桥梁。
answer_first.zht: 向莫三比克出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期：由 INNOQ 管理的受管制電氣產品合規，建立在採納 IEC 60598-1 / 60598 系列（燈具安全）、IEC 62560（自鎮流燈）、IEC 61347-2-13（LED 控制裝置）、CISPR 15 / IEC 61547（電磁兼容）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）的 NM（莫三比克標準）之上；220 V / 50 Hz 供電（50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，但中國三相 380 V 產品須對照 220 V 單相額定值核查）；照明產品的能效 / 標籤預期；任何具備無線功能的燈具須取得 INCM（莫三比克國家通信研究所）型號核准；葡萄牙語文件、說明書及標識；以及通過馬普托、貝拉或納卡拉口岸清關的在地進口商。莫三比克不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS / 限用物質或 REACH 式化學品通報制度，因此無與歐盟生態設計能效法規直接對應的制度（能效標籤為最接近的抓手），亦無須滿足的橫向 RoHS——但進口商應核實現行 INNOQ 受管制產品清單及任何行業能效計劃。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 檢測報告不自動獲認可；基於 IEC 的（IECEE CB）檢測報告是實際的橋樑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon any change to INNOQ regulated-product lists, adopted NM/IEC standard editions, Mozambique energy-labelling rules, or INCM radio approval procedures
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. INNOQ conformity scope, adopted NM/IEC standard editions, and INCM radio approval requirements must be re-verified against current Mozambique regulator sources and confirmed with the in-country importer on each review cycle. Mozambique is treated as IEC-adopting; any claim that a horizontal RoHS / chemical regime exists must be independently verified before being stated as a requirement.
